name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie flat on the bench, grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder-width. Lower the bar to your mid-chest, then press back up to full arm extension.

name: Barbell Incline Bench Press
instructions: Set bench to 30–45 degrees incline. Grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder-width, lower to upper chest, then press back up.

name: Barbell Decline Bench Press
instructions: Set bench to a slight decline. Secure feet and unrack the barbell, lower it to lower chest, then press back up.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench holding a dumbbell in each hand at chest level. Press them up until arms are fully extended, then lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Incline Bench Press
instructions: Set bench to 30–45 degrees. Hold a dumbbell in each hand at chest level, press up to full extension, then lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Decline Bench Press
instructions: Set bench to a decline. Secure feet, hold dumbbells at lower chest, press up to full extension, then lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Chest Fly
instructions: Lie flat on bench, hold dumbbells above chest with a slight bend in elbows. Lower arms out to the sides in an arc, then bring them back together.

name: Dumbbell Incline Fly
instructions: Set bench to 30–45 degrees. Hold dumbbells above chest, lower arms out in an arc, then squeeze chest to bring them back together.

name: Cable Chest Fly
instructions: Set cables at shoulder height. Stand in center, hold handles, step forward, and bring handles together in a wide arc in front of your chest.

name: Cable Low-to-High Fly
instructions: Set cables at the lowest position. With arms slightly bent, bring handles up and together in an arc targeting upper chest. Control the return.

name: Cable High-to-Low Fly
instructions: Set cables at the highest position. Pull handles down and together in an arc targeting lower chest. Control the return.

name: Machine Chest Press
instructions: Sit on the machine with back flat against pad. Grip handles at chest level and press forward to full extension, then return slowly.

name: Pec Deck Machine
instructions: Sit upright on the pec deck, forearms on pads. Bring arms together in front of your chest, squeeze at the midpoint, then return.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Start in a high plank with hands slightly wider than shoulder-width. Lower chest to the floor, then push back up to full arm extension.

name: Wide-Grip Push-Up
instructions: Assume push-up position with hands wider than shoulder-width. Lower chest toward floor with elbows flaring out, then press back up.

name: Diamond Push-Up
instructions: Form a diamond shape with your hands directly under your chest. Lower slowly, keeping elbows close to the body, then press back up.

name: Decline Push-Up
instructions: Place feet on a bench and hands on the floor. Perform a push-up, focusing on upper chest engagement.

name: Incline Push-Up
instructions: Place hands on an elevated surface like a bench. Lower your chest toward the surface, then push back up. Great regression for standard push-ups.

name: Chest Dip
instructions: Grip parallel bars and support your weight. Lean forward slightly and lower your body until elbows are at 90 degrees, then press back up.

name: Barbell Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart, bar over mid-foot. Hinge at hips, grip the bar, brace your core, then drive through heels to stand. Lower with control.

name: Barbell Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold barbell at hip level, push hips back while lowering bar along thighs until you feel a stretch in hamstrings. Drive hips forward to return.

name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold dumbbells in front of thighs. Push hips back, lowering dumbbells along legs until hamstrings are stretched. Drive hips forward to return.

name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
instructions: Hinge at hips with a flat back, hold barbell with overhand grip. Pull bar to lower chest/upper abdomen, squeeze shoulder blades, then lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Bent-Over Row
instructions: Hold dumbbells with palms facing each other. Hinge at hips, pull dumbbells up toward hips, squeezing shoulder blades at the top.

name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
instructions: Place one hand and knee on a bench for support. Hold dumbbell with free hand, pull it to your hip while keeping elbow close to body. Lower with control.

name: Cable Seated Row
instructions: Sit at cable row machine, feet on platform. Pull the handle to your lower abdomen while keeping back straight, squeeze shoulder blades, then return slowly.

name: Cable Single-Arm Row
instructions: Set cable at low position. Stand or kneel, pull handle with one arm to your hip, rotate slightly at the top. Control the return.

name: Cable Straight-Arm Pulldown
instructions: Set cable at high position. Stand facing machine, hold bar with straight arms. Pull bar down to thighs in an arc, keeping arms straight. Return slowly.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit at lat pulldown station, grip bar wider than shoulder-width. Pull bar to upper chest while driving elbows down and back. Return with control.

name: Close-Grip Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit at lat pulldown with a close neutral grip. Pull the handle to your upper chest, focusing on lat contraction. Return with control.

name: Machine Row
instructions: Sit at the row machine, chest against pad. Pull handles to your sides, squeezing shoulder blades together at the end of the movement.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from bar with overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width. Pull your chest to the bar, driving elbows down. Lower with full control.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Hang from bar with underhand grip shoulder-width apart. Pull your chin above the bar, squeezing biceps and lats. Lower fully.

name: Neutral-Grip Pull-Up
instructions: Grip parallel bars with palms facing each other. Pull chest to bar, keeping elbows close to body. Lower with full control.

name: Inverted Row
instructions: Set a barbell in a rack at hip height. Hang below it with straight body, pull chest to bar, squeeze shoulder blades, then lower.

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet wider than shoulder-width and toes pointed out. Grip the bar inside your legs. Drive through heels to stand, keeping chest tall.

name: Barbell Overhead Press
instructions: Stand with barbell at shoulder height, grip just outside shoulder-width. Press straight up overhead to full arm extension, then lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Overhead Press
instructions: Sit or stand with dumbbells at shoulder height, palms facing forward. Press up to full extension, then lower with control.

name: Arnold Press
instructions: Start with dumbbells at chin level, palms facing you. As you press up, rotate palms outward, finishing with palms facing away at full extension.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit with back against pad. Grip handles at shoulder height and press overhead to full extension, then return slowly.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at sides. Raise arms out to the sides until parallel with the floor, leading with elbows. Lower slowly.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Set cable at lowest position. Stand to the side and raise the handle out and up to shoulder height, keeping arm nearly straight. Lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Front Raise
instructions: Hold dumbbells in front of thighs. Raise one or both arms forward to shoulder height, keeping a slight bend in elbows. Lower slowly.

name: Cable Front Raise
instructions: Set cable at lowest position. Stand facing away and raise the handle forward to shoulder height. Lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Rear Delt Fly
instructions: Hinge at hips or lie face down on incline bench. Raise dumbbells out to sides, squeezing rear delts at the top. Lower slowly.

name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
instructions: Set cables at shoulder height, cross them. Pull handles apart, bringing arms out to sides and squeezing rear delts. Control the return.

name: Barbell Upright Row
instructions: Hold barbell with a close overhand grip. Pull the bar straight up to chin level, leading with elbows. Lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Upright Row
instructions: Hold dumbbells in front of thighs. Pull them straight up, leading with elbows, until handles reach chin level. Lower slowly.

name: Barbell Shrug
instructions: Hold barbell in front with overhand grip. Shrug shoulders straight up as high as possible, hold briefly, then lower.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides. Shrug shoulders straight up toward ears, hold briefly, then lower with control.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Stand with barbell in front, underhand grip shoulder-width. Curl the bar up to your shoulders, squeeze biceps at top, then lower slowly.

name: EZ Bar Curl
instructions: Grip EZ bar at the angled grips. Curl the bar up to your shoulders, squeeze at the top, then lower slowly. Easier on wrists than straight bar.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides. Curl both or alternating, rotating palms up. Squeeze at the top, then lower with control.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Hold dumbbells with palms facing each other (neutral grip). Curl up keeping the neutral grip, squeeze at top, then lower slowly.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Sit on an incline bench, arms hanging straight. Curl dumbbells up with supinated grip, emphasizing the long head of the bicep. Lower fully.

name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Sit on a bench, elbow braced against inner thigh. Curl dumbbell up to shoulder, fully contracting bicep. Lower slowly.

name: Cable Curl
instructions: Stand at low cable, grip bar or rope with underhand grip. Curl up to shoulders with constant tension, then lower with control.

name: Cable Hammer Curl
instructions: Attach rope to low cable. Grip ends with neutral grip and curl up, keeping palms facing each other throughout. Lower slowly.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Rest upper arms on the preacher bench pad. Curl the bar up with a full range of motion, squeeze at the top, then lower fully.

name: Machine Bicep Curl
instructions: Sit at machine with arms resting on pads. Curl handles toward shoulders, squeeze at top, then lower with control.

name: Barbell Skull Crusher
instructions: Lie on bench, hold barbell above you with arms extended. Bend elbows to lower bar toward forehead, then extend arms back up.

name: EZ Bar Skull Crusher
instructions: Lie on bench, hold EZ bar above you. Lower bar toward forehead by bending elbows, then extend back up. Easier on wrists.

name: Dumbbell Skull Crusher
instructions: Lie on bench, hold dumbbells above you. Bend elbows to lower dumbbells toward your temples, then extend back up. Keep elbows in.

name: Dumbbell Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Hold dumbbell with both hands overhead at arm's length. Lower behind head by bending elbows, then extend back up.

name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Set cable at high position. Stand and grip bar with overhand grip, keeping elbows at sides. Push bar down to full extension, then return slowly.

name: Cable Rope Pushdown
instructions: Attach rope to high cable. Grip ends, keep elbows at sides, push down and spread ends outward at the bottom for full contraction.

name: Cable Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Set cable at low position, stand facing away. Grip rope overhead with elbows bent. Extend arms overhead, then return slowly.

name: Machine Tricep Extension
instructions: Sit at the tricep extension machine. Press handles down to full arm extension, squeeze triceps, then return.

name: Tricep Dip
instructions: Grip dip bars, keep body upright. Lower until elbows are at 90 degrees, then press back up. Keep torso vertical to target triceps.

name: Bench Dip
instructions: Place hands on a bench behind you, feet on floor. Dip down by bending elbows to 90 degrees, then push back up.

name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Position barbell on traps, feet shoulder-width. Descend until thighs are parallel to floor, keeping chest up and knees tracking toes. Drive back up.

name: Barbell Front Squat
instructions: Rest barbell on front deltoids with elbows high. Squat down keeping torso upright, then drive back up. Demands significant ankle and thoracic mobility.

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold a kettlebell or dumbbell at chest height. Squat down between your arms, keeping elbows inside knees at the bottom. Drive back up.

name: Dumbbell Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold a dumbbell vertically at chest height. Perform a squat, keeping chest tall and elbows inside knees at the bottom.

name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions: Stand feet shoulder-width. Lower down as if sitting in a chair until thighs are parallel, keeping chest up. Drive back up through heels.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Sit in machine, feet on platform at shoulder-width. Release safety, lower weight until knees are at 90 degrees, press back up without locking knees.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Sit in machine with pad on shins. Extend legs to full lockout, squeeze quads, then lower slowly. Do not hyperextend.

name: Barbell Lunge
instructions: Hold barbell on traps. Step forward into a lunge, lowering back knee toward floor, then push back to start. Alternate legs.

name: Dumbbell Lunge
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides. Step forward into a lunge, lower back knee toward floor, push back to start. Alternate legs.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Step forward into a lunge, then instead of returning to start, bring the trailing foot forward and lunge on the opposite side. Repeat across the floor.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Place rear foot on bench, hold dumbbells. Lower front leg until thigh is parallel to floor, then drive back up. Complete all reps on one side.

name: Step-Up
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides. Step onto a bench with one foot, drive up to full extension, then step down. Alternate legs.

name: Lying Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down on machine, pad at Achilles. Curl legs up toward glutes, squeeze hamstrings at the top, then lower slowly.

name: Seated Leg Curl
instructions: Sit in machine with pad above Achilles. Press legs down, squeeze hamstrings at the bottom, then return slowly.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
instructions: Kneel and have a partner hold your ankles. Lower your body toward the floor by slowly extending knees, using hands to catch yourself. Curl back up.

name: Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold dumbbell in one hand, balance on opposite foot. Hinge forward, lowering dumbbell and raising free leg behind. Return to start.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit against a bench with barbell over hips. Drive hips up to full extension, squeezing glutes at the top, then lower. Keep chin tucked.

name: Dumbbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit against a bench with a dumbbell on your hips. Drive hips up to full extension, squeezing glutes. Lower with control.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on back with knees bent, feet flat. Drive hips up to full extension, squeezing glutes at top. Lower slowly.

name: Cable Glute Kickback
instructions: Attach ankle strap to cable. Face the machine, kick one leg back and up, squeezing glute at the top. Lower with control.

name: Sumo Squat
instructions: Stand with feet wide, toes pointed out. Hold a dumbbell between legs. Squat down, keeping chest tall, then drive back up.

name: Donkey Kick
instructions: Start on hands and knees. Kick one leg back and up, keeping knee bent at 90 degrees, squeezing glute at the top. Lower and repeat.

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width. Rise onto toes as high as possible, pause, then lower heels below platform for a full stretch.

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Sit at machine with pads on knees and balls of feet on platform. Rise onto toes, pause at top, then lower for full stretch.

name: Machine Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Stand in machine with pads on shoulders. Rise onto toes as high as possible, then lower heels for full stretch.

name: Single-Leg Calf Raise
instructions: Hold a dumbbell, balance on one foot on a step. Rise onto toes, pause, then lower heel below the step for a full stretch.

name: Plank
instructions: Hold a forearm plank position with body in a straight line. Brace core, squeeze glutes, keep hips level. Hold for time.

name: Side Plank
instructions: Lie on side, prop up on forearm with feet stacked. Lift hips off ground to create a straight line. Hold for time.

name: Crunch
instructions: Lie on back, knees bent. Curl shoulders off the floor by contracting abs, then lower. Avoid pulling on neck.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel facing cable with rope at head height. Hold rope at ears and crunch down, rounding spine, then return. Keep hips stationary.

name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Lie on back, hands behind head. Alternate bringing opposite elbow to knee in a cycling motion, keeping other leg extended.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from a bar, keep core tight. Raise legs to 90 degrees or higher while preventing swinging. Lower slowly.

name: Lying Leg Raise
instructions: Lie flat on back, hands under glutes. Raise straight legs to 90 degrees, then lower slowly without touching the floor.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit with knees bent and feet elevated. Hold a plate or medicine ball. Rotate torso side to side, touching the ground each rep.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Kneel and grip the ab wheel. Roll forward as far as you can while keeping back flat, then pull back. Control throughout.

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on back, arms extended overhead, hips and knees at 90 degrees. Lower opposite arm and leg simultaneously while pressing lower back to floor. Return and alternate.

name: Pallof Press
instructions: Stand side-on to a cable set at chest height. Hold handle at chest, press out to full arm extension, then return. Resist rotation throughout.

name: Landmine Rotation
instructions: Hold the end of a barbell at chest level. Rotate from side to side in an arc, keeping core braced and arms slightly bent.

name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Start in a high plank. Alternate driving knees to chest rapidly, keeping hips level and core tight.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Hinge at hips with kettlebell between legs. Drive hips forward explosively to swing the bell to chest height. Let it swing back and repeat.

name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold kettlebell at chest. Squat between your arms, keeping chest tall and elbows inside knees. Drive back up.

name: Kettlebell Clean and Press
instructions: Clean the kettlebell from a swing to rack position, then press overhead. Lower and repeat. Requires hip drive and overhead stability.

name: Burpee
instructions: From standing, squat down, kick feet back into a plank, perform a push-up, jump feet back to hands, then jump up with arms overhead.

name: Barbell Thruster
instructions: Hold barbell at shoulder height. Squat down, then explosively drive up and press bar overhead in one fluid motion. Lower bar and repeat.

name: Dumbbell Thruster
instructions: Hold dumbbells at shoulder height. Squat then drive up, pressing dumbbells overhead at the top. Lower and repeat.

name: Clean and Jerk
instructions: Pull barbell from floor to shoulder rack position (clean), then drive it overhead using a leg drive and press (jerk). Requires Olympic lifting technique.

name: Barbell Snatch
instructions: Pull barbell from floor to overhead in one explosive movement with a wide grip. Requires full-body power and Olympic lifting technique.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Stand in front of a box. Dip down and jump explosively onto the box, landing softly with knees slightly bent. Step down and repeat.

name: Jump Squat
instructions: Perform a squat, then explode upward jumping as high as possible. Land softly and immediately descend into the next rep.

name: Battle Ropes
instructions: Hold rope ends, stand in athletic stance. Alternate or double-wave the ropes as fast as possible for the set duration.

name: Treadmill Run
instructions: Set desired speed and incline on treadmill. Maintain upright posture, relaxed arms, and steady breathing throughout.

name: Treadmill Sprint Interval
instructions: Alternate between 30 seconds of maximum effort sprinting and 60 seconds of walking recovery for the prescribed number of sets.

name: Rowing Machine
instructions: Drive with legs first, then lean back, then pull handle to lower chest. Reverse the order to return. Maintain steady strokes per minute.

name: Stationary Bike
instructions: Adjust seat height so knee has a slight bend at bottom of pedal stroke. Maintain a smooth cadence at target resistance.

name: Elliptical
instructions: Step onto elliptical and push pedals in a smooth oval motion. Use arm handles for upper body engagement. Maintain upright posture.

name: Stair Climber
instructions: Step onto machine and set speed. Push through the full foot and drive with glutes. Avoid leaning heavily on handrails.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Hold rope ends, swing overhead, and jump as rope passes under feet. Keep elbows at sides and rotate the wrist.

name: Double Under
instructions: Jump rope but swing the rope twice under your feet per jump. Requires timing and wrist speed. Keep jumps low and efficient.

name: Good Morning
instructions: Place barbell on traps. Hinge forward at hips with a flat back until torso is near parallel, then drive back to upright.

name: Pendlay Row
instructions: Start with barbell on the floor, torso horizontal. Explosively row barbell to lower chest, lower all the way back to floor each rep.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Set cable at face height with rope attachment. Pull rope to face while driving elbows back and out, rotating hands out at the end. Return slowly.

name: Dumbbell Pullover
instructions: Lie across a bench, hold dumbbell above chest. Lower it behind your head with arms slightly bent, then pull back to start.

name: Cable Pullover
instructions: Stand facing away from a high cable, hold a bar overhead. Pull bar down in an arc to your hips, keeping arms mostly straight.

name: Hack Squat
instructions: Position on hack squat machine with shoulders against pads. Unlock and descend until knees are at 90 degrees, then press back up.

name: Sissy Squat
instructions: Hold a fixed object for balance. Lean back, rise onto toes, and bend knees while letting them travel far forward. Return by driving through quads.

name: Farmer's Carry
instructions: Hold heavy dumbbells at sides. Walk with a tall spine, tight core, and controlled steps for the prescribed time or distance.

name: Suitcase Carry
instructions: Hold a heavy dumbbell in one hand only. Walk with a tall spine, resisting lateral lean. Switch sides between sets.

name: Band Pull-Apart
instructions: Hold resistance band at shoulder height in front with arms extended. Pull band apart, bringing arms out to sides, squeezing rear delts. Return slowly.

name: Cable Y-Raise
instructions: Set cables low, stand between them. Raise arms up and out to form a Y shape, squeezing shoulder blades together at the top.

name: V-Up
instructions: Lie flat, arms overhead. Simultaneously raise straight legs and torso, reaching hands toward feet to form a V. Lower with control.

name: Toe Touch
instructions: Lie on back with legs raised to 90 degrees. Reach hands up toward toes by lifting shoulders off the floor, then lower.

name: Cable Wood Chop
instructions: Set cable at high position. Grab handle with both hands, rotate and pull diagonally across body from high to low. Control the return.

name: Medicine Ball Slam
instructions: Hold medicine ball above head with arms fully extended. Slam the ball to the floor as hard as possible. Catch on the bounce and repeat.

name: Medicine Ball Rotational Throw
instructions: Stand side-on to a wall. Rotate and throw the medicine ball against the wall with explosive force. Catch and repeat.

name: Zercher Squat
instructions: Hold barbell in the crook of your elbows, arms crossed. Squat down keeping chest tall, elbows between knees, then drive back up.

name: Bear Crawl
instructions: Start on hands and knees with knees hovering off the floor. Move opposite hand and foot simultaneously while keeping back flat and hips low.

name: Hyperextension
instructions: Position hips on hyperextension bench. Fold forward, then extend back to horizontal by contracting glutes and lower back. Do not hyperextend.

name: Reverse Hyperextension
instructions: Lie face down on machine, hold handles. Swing legs up by contracting glutes, then control the return past horizontal.

name: Hollow Body Hold
instructions: Lie on back, press lower back to floor. Raise legs and shoulders off floor with arms extended overhead. Hold the position.

name: Superman
instructions: Lie face down with arms extended overhead. Simultaneously raise arms, chest, and legs off the floor. Hold briefly, then lower.

name: Reverse Lunge
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides. Step backward into a lunge, lowering back knee toward floor. Push through front foot to return. Alternate legs.

name: Lateral Lunge
instructions: Step out to one side, pushing hips back into that leg while keeping opposite leg straight. Push back to center and alternate sides.

name: Sled Push
instructions: Load the sled and push it by driving through legs with a low forward lean. Maintain a strong core and drive with big strides.

name: Sled Pull
instructions: Attach a harness or rope to sled. Walk or run backward pulling the sled for the prescribed distance or time.

name: Barbell Wrist Curl
instructions: Sit with forearms on thighs, palms up holding barbell. Allow bar to roll to fingertips, then curl wrists up fully. Lower with control.

name: Reverse Wrist Curl
instructions: Sit with forearms on thighs, palms down holding barbell. Extend wrists as far as possible, then curl them upward.

name: Tire Flip
instructions: Lower into a deadlift-like position gripping the bottom of the tire. Drive through legs, then re-grip higher and push tire over.

name: Cable Upright Row
instructions: Set cable at low position. Pull bar or rope straight up to chin, leading with elbows. Lower with control.

name: Pistol Squat
instructions: Balance on one foot with the other extended forward. Lower until standing leg's thigh is parallel, then press back up. Keep torso as upright as possible.

name: Wall Sit
instructions: Stand against a wall and slide down until thighs are parallel to the floor. Hold position for the prescribed time.

name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Straddle the bar and hinge forward. Pull bar to chest using a close neutral grip, squeezing shoulder blades. Lower with control.

name: Meadows Row
instructions: Stand perpendicular to a landmine barbell. Hinge, grip end of bar with outside hand, row up to hip. Complete all reps then switch sides.

name: Turkish Get-Up
instructions: Lie on back with kettlebell in one hand pressed to ceiling. Go through the multi-step process of standing while keeping kettlebell locked out overhead.

name: Sandbag Carry
instructions: Bear hug or shoulder a sandbag. Walk with a braced core and controlled breathing. The unstable load adds a unique challenge vs dumbbells.
